title: Require Service Boundary Platform Independence
forbids: a service contract, schema, or DTO declaration that directly acquires a Node or Bun platform module
why: Domain declarations describe portable service boundaries; concrete platform acquisition belongs behind service context and resource providers.
remediate: Keep contracts, schemas, and DTOs platform-neutral, and inject filesystem, process, storage, or runtime capabilities through the service context and an explicit resource provider.
message: Service boundary declarations must not import concrete Node or Bun platform modules.
